parameters.query: INSERT INTO tenants (name, slug, plan, deployment_type, api_keys, config) VALUES ('{{ $json.body.brand_name }}', '{{ $json.body.slug }}', '{{ $json.body.plan }}', '{{ $json.body.deployment_type }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.body.api_keys) }}'::jsonb, '{"currency": "GBP"}'::jsonb) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO users (tenant_id, email, password_hash, name, role) VALUES ({{ $json.id }}, '{{ $('POST /api/onboard').item.json.body.admin_email }}', '$2b$10$placeholder', '{{ $('POST /api/onboard').item.json.body.admin_name }}', 'admin') RETURNING id, email
INSERT INTO channels (tenant_id, name, status) VALUES ({{ $json.tenant_id }}, '{{ $json.name }}', '{{ $json.status }}')

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, tenant_id: $('Create Tenant').item.json.id, dashboard_url: 'http://localhost:3000', login_email: $('Create Admin User').item.json.email }) }}

parameters.content:
## Tenant Onboarding

POST /api/onboard
1. Creates tenant record
2. Creates admin user
3. Sets up channel records
4. Triggers initial data sync
5. Returns dashboard URL + credentials
